tool.name: pMLST-SSI database
tool.description: download or update the pMLST-SSI database
tool.command: mkdir -p '${out_file.extra_files_path}/pmlst_db' && #if str($test_fixture) == "true" cp -R '$__tool_directory__/../test-data/pmlst_fixture_db/.' '${out_file.extra_files_path}/pmlst_db/' && kma_index -i '${out_file.extra_files_path}/pmlst_db/incf.fsa' -o '${out_file.extra_files_path}/pmlst_db/incf' && #else pmlst-download-db '${out_file.extra_files_path}/pmlst_db' && #end if bash write_dm_json.sh '${out_file.extra_files_path}/pmlst_db' > dm.json

configfiles.configfile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -euo pipefail
version="unknown" version_file="\$1/version.txt"
if [ -f "\$version_file" ]; then extracted_version="\$(sed -n 's/^version:[[:space:]]*//p' "\$version_file" | head -n 1)" if [[ "\$extracted_version" == ????-??-?? ]]; then version="\$extracted_version" fi fi
value="\$version"
printf '{"data_tables": {"pmlst_db": [{"value": "%s", "path": "pmlst_db"}]}}\n' "\$value"

tool.help: This data manager installs or updates the pMLST database used by the pMLST-SSI.
